assertions.source_quote: The **Current period** tab is a comprehensive resource for understanding your platform usage during the ongoing billing cycle.
The **Historical usage** tab provides a detailed view of your monthly platform usage, excluding any free Actor compute units or discounts from your subscription plan.
Navigate to [Subscription](https://console.apify.com/billing/subscription) section in Apify Console, and click the **Buy add-ons** button to explore the available options.
The **Limits** tab displays the usage limits for the Apify platform based on your current subscription plan.
The **Current period** tab is a comprehensive resource for understanding your platform usage during the ongoing billing cycle.
The **Historical usage** tab provides a detailed view of your monthly platform usage
The **Subscription** tab offers a central location to manage various aspects of your subscription plan.
The **Pricing** tab offers a way to quickly check all unit pricing for various platform services related to Apify usage for your account.
The **Invoices** tab is where you can find your current and previous invoices for Apify platform usage.
The **Limits** tab displays the usage limits for the Apify platform based on your current subscription plan.

assertions.page_context: Billing > Current period tab, Plan Consumption graph
assertions.source_quote: the tab features a **Plan Consumption** Graph. It shows how much of your free or paid plan has been utilized up to this point.

assertions.page_context: Billing > Current period tab, statistics sections under graph
assertions.source_quote: You can access detailed statistics related to **Actors**, **Data transfer**, **Proxy**, and **Storage**.

assertions.page_context: Billing > Historical usage tab, table below the bar chart
assertions.source_quote: Below the bar chart, there is a table titled **Usage by Actors**. This table presents a detailed breakdown of the Compute units used per Actor and the associated costs.

assertions.page_context: Billing > Subscription tab, Plan add-ons section
assertions.source_quote: click the **Buy add-ons** button to explore the available options.
